name: manage_campaigns
description: Create, update, start, pause, or retrieve outreach campaigns in Lemlist. Each campaign has sequences of automated steps (emails, LinkedIn messages, etc.). You can also pull detailed stats and reports on campaign performance including send rates, open rates, click rates, and reply rates.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset for the campaign list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of campaigns to return.
